title: Verify Integration with WhatsApp/Push Notification System
description: Tests that setting a reminder successfully triggers a notification request to the appropriate service.
preconditions: User has an active trial and has granted notification permissions.
QA has access to notification service logs or a test environment.

steps.description: 1. Set the user's trial to expire in approximately 24 hours.
2. Navigate to the 'Trial Corner' and enable the 'Remind me' toggle.
3. Monitor the backend logs or notification service for an outgoing message scheduled for this user.
4. Wait for the notification to be delivered.

expected_result: A notification (WhatsApp or Push) should be successfully scheduled and delivered to the user 24 hours before the trial's expiration time. The message content should be accurate.
